prestigeLine: Alphabet research lab building Gemini-scale model systems.
title: Software Engineer, Gemini Agent Products
rationale: Om's agent orchestration and ML systems work maps well to Gemini agent products, especially workflow UX, evaluation tooling, and production AI surfaces.
strengths: Strong fit for agent infrastructure and applied ML evaluation.
Evidence of full-stack ownership across AI product surfaces.
Strong company and technical surface for Om's AI systems direction.
risks: Google-scale systems interviews will still probe distributed systems depth beyond the resume evidence.
mission: Google DeepMind turns frontier AI research into reliable products used across Google and by external developers.

prestigeLine: Device-scale intelligence across iOS, macOS, and private cloud compute.
title: Software Engineer, Apple Intelligence Workflows
rationale: Apple Intelligence workflow engineering is relevant to Om's polished AI-product work, but Apple platform APIs, Swift, and on-device constraints are less proven by the resume.
strengths: Relevant user-facing AI workflow experience.
Strong product engineering signal for polished AI experiences.
Experience translating model behavior into usable interfaces.
risks: Apple-specific platform APIs, Swift, and on-device optimization are the main gaps.
mission: Apple Intelligence brings personal, private AI assistance into the core operating systems people use every day.

prestigeLine: The infrastructure layer behind modern accelerated AI.
title: Software Engineer, AI Developer Tools
rationale: NVIDIA developer tools are adjacent to Om's production AI systems and workflow-builder experience, with less low-level CUDA emphasis than an inference-platform seat.
strengths: Some match for production ML systems and model-serving workflows.
Can bridge model-serving workflows and developer-facing tooling.
Prestigious infrastructure brand with broad AI ecosystem reach.
risks: GPU ecosystem depth and lower-level performance work are not front-and-center in the resume.
mission: NVIDIA builds accelerated computing platforms powering AI training, inference, simulation, and robotics.

prestigeLine: Research and product lab behind ChatGPT and API platform agents.
title: Product Engineer, Applied Agents
rationale: Om's Recruit build, agent workflow automation, resume tailoring, and UX-rich AI surfaces are directly aligned with product engineering for applied agents.
strengths: Best match for agent workflow product surfaces.
Direct evidence of shipping full-stack AI applications quickly.
TypeScript, React, Python, eval, and orchestration signals all line up.
risks: The bar for product taste, AI safety tradeoffs, and ambiguity handling will be high.
mission: OpenAI builds useful, safe AI systems and turns frontier model capability into products people can use.

prestigeLine: Open model ecosystem and global-scale ranking infrastructure.
title: Product Engineer, Llama Developer Platform
rationale: The profile combines AI application engineering, ranking workflows, and developer-tool orientation, which fits Llama platform product infrastructure.
strengths: Strong bridge between open model tooling and product engineering.
Relevant ranking and recommendation-system project context.
High-scale infrastructure and developer ecosystem exposure.
risks: Large-system design and cross-functional execution examples should be sharpened.
mission: Meta advances social products, open AI models, and large-scale infrastructure for billions of users.

prestigeLine: Enterprise AI products spanning GitHub, Office, Azure, and Windows.
title: Software Engineer, Copilot Agent Workflows
rationale: Om's agentic workflow and application-building experience is highly relevant to Copilot features that need reliable product integration across developer and enterprise surfaces.
strengths: Strong applied AI and workflow automation fit.
Experience with developer-facing tools and enterprise-style flows.
Prestigious AI product surface with broad distribution.
risks: Enterprise scale, accessibility, and long-horizon maintenance examples should be made explicit.
mission: Microsoft AI brings copilots into work, software development, operating systems, and cloud platforms.

prestigeLine: Large-scale assistant and commerce intelligence systems.
title: Software Development Engineer, Agentic Shopping Workflows
rationale: Om's ranking, job-agent, and applied ML experience maps to agentic retrieval, personalization, and commerce-assistant workflows.
strengths: Good fit for retrieval-backed agents and marketplace ranking.
Strong evidence of fast prototyping and applied AI product thinking.
Prestigious applied science track with massive product surface.
risks: Commerce-scale experimentation examples should be sharpened before applying.
mission: Amazon AGI develops assistant systems and model capabilities for shopping, logistics, cloud, and consumer experiences.

prestigeLine: Frontier model company focused on reliable, steerable AI systems.
title: Product Engineer, Claude Workflows
rationale: Om's work on agent flows, careful UX, tool orchestration, and evaluation-backed workflows maps tightly to Claude workflow features.
strengths: Excellent alignment with reliable agentic product workflows.
Evidence of taste in calm, usable AI interfaces.
Prestige signal from a frontier model lab.
risks: Safety, eval, and failure-mode examples should be brought to the front of the resume.
mission: Anthropic builds helpful, honest, harmless AI systems and developer products around Claude.

prestigeLine: Real-world AI systems across vehicles, robotics, and energy.
title: Software Engineer, AI Operations Tools
rationale: Tesla's AI operations tooling has some overlap with data pipelines and evaluation loops, but physical autonomy context is still a weaker match than agent-product roles.
strengths: Some fit for data feedback loops and AI infrastructure.
Strong systems-building signal from full-stack agent projects.
Prestigious hard-tech brand with concrete real-world deployment.
risks: Autonomy-specific perception, robotics, and embedded deployment depth are the main gaps.
mission: Tesla builds autonomy, robotics, energy, and vehicle software deployed into physical products at global scale.
